description_long: This church is a grand, historic structure with a large central dome topped by a lantern and spire, reminiscent of Baroque architecture. The facade is richly ornamented with pilasters, arched windows, and decorative stonework, giving it a stately and monumental appearance. Four smaller corner towers with spires accentuate the main dome, while the roof features a mix of steep and gently sloping sections covered in slate or similar dark material. The windows are tall and arched, framed by intricate moldings, and the main entrance is marked by a prominent doorway with classical detailing. The building's stone exterior is light in color, suggesting limestone or sandstone, and the overall form is symmetrical and balanced. The church exudes a sense of historical significance and serves as a landmark in any urban setting.
description: A grand Baroque-style church with a large central dome, ornate stone facade, and multiple spires. The structure features arched windows, decorative detailing, and a stately, symmetrical presence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central dome, and detailed facade with arched windows and pilasters.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the symmetrical structure, corner towers, and the full height of the dome and spire.
description_view_2: Angled view displaying both the main entrance and the side, emphasizing the ornate stonework and roof details.
description_view_3: Rear view with a focus on the back facade, dome, and the architectural symmetry of the building.
